# iSmartSync

> Shopify Integrated POS for multi-branch retailers running physical stores, Shopify orders, branch stock, and fulfillment workflows from one operational system.

iSmartSync is a Shopify Integrated POS and branch-operations layer for Shopify-connected retail businesses.

Shopify handles the online storefront, ecommerce orders, and online customer activity.
iSmartSync handles in-store billing, branch stock, order execution, fulfillment workflows, transfers, returns, staff operations, and reporting.

Branch stock truth lives inside iSmartSync.

## Inventory logic

- an in-store sale deducts stock immediately from the selling branch
- Shopify inventory is then synced to reflect the new quantity
- a Shopify order does not follow one generic deduction rule; it follows the fulfillment workflow your team uses

## Fulfillment workflows

- Smart Fulfillment: staff fulfills the Shopify order inside iSmartSync; branch movement is recorded inside iSmartSync as part of the fulfillment flow
- Manual Fulfillment: branch staff records what physically moved inside iSmartSync; Shopify fulfillment remains handled separately
- Branch Sync: fulfillment is led from Shopify first, and iSmartSync applies the correct branch-level stock movement afterward

This means iSmartSync is not just a storefront connector. It is the system that keeps branch-level inventory understandable when stores, Shopify orders, fulfillment, returns, and exchanges all interact.

A common iSmartSync workflow is:

- connect Shopify once
- import products, variants, customers, and locations
- use the imported inventory structure inside iSmartSync
- create and operate multiple branches from one centralized dashboard

This helps retailers reduce:

- inventory drift
- overselling
- duplicate stock deductions
- manual reconciliation
- branch-level confusion
- post-sale spreadsheet correction

## Shopify and branch operations

- [Shopify Integrated POS Point of Sale](https://ismartsync.com/shopify-integrated-pos-point-of-sale): Shopify-connected POS for branch-based retail
- [Shopify Retail POS Integration](https://ismartsync.com/shopify-retail-pos-integration): How Shopify and iSmartSync work together across stores
- [Shopify Order Fulfillment Through POS](https://ismartsync.com/shopify-order-fulfillment-through-pos): Smart Fulfillment, Manual Fulfillment, and branch-aware order execution
- [Multi-Location Inventory Management](https://ismartsync.com/multi-location-inventory-management): Import Shopify locations and operate multiple branches
- [Multi-Branch Inventory and Order Management](https://ismartsync.com/multi-branch-inventory-and-order-management): Branch-level stock and order operations

## Billing, reporting, and compliance

- [Counter-Wise Billing and Checkout](https://ismartsync.com/counter-wise-billing-and-checkout): Branch and counter billing workflows
- [POS Analytics and Reporting](https://ismartsync.com/pos-analytics-and-reporting): Operational reporting and visibility
- [FBR Integrated POS Point of Sale System](https://ismartsync.com/fbr-integrated-pos-point-of-sale-system): Pakistan-focused compliance workflows

## Key guides

- [How to Sync Shopify Inventory Across Multiple Branches](https://ismartsync.com/blog/how-to-sync-shopify-inventory-across-multiple-branches): Branch inventory strategy
- [How to Fulfill Shopify Orders From the Right Store or Branch](https://ismartsync.com/blog/how-to-fulfill-shopify-orders-from-the-right-store-or-branch): Order routing and execution
- [Why Stock Mismatches Happen Between Shopify and Physical Stores](https://ismartsync.com/blog/why-stock-mismatches-happen-between-shopify-and-physical-stores): Inventory mismatch explanation
- [How COD Orders Destroy Shopify Inventory in Pakistan](https://ismartsync.com/blog/how-cod-orders-destroy-shopify-inventory-pakistan): COD-related stock drift
- [FBR Integration with Shopify POS — Pakistan Guide](https://ismartsync.com/blog/fbr-integration-shopify-pos-pakistan-guide): Compliance and billing guide
